approach: Add a new Preact TimelinePanel to the spec-viewer webview that renders the existing transitions[] array from .spec-context.json as a vertical, oldest-first list grouped by step.

specify.key_finding: `.spec-context.json` already stores a structured `transitions` array (step, substep, from, by, at) written by every /sdd:* skill via buildTransitionEntry, but no spec-viewer code or webview component currently reads or renders it — the data is ready, only a UI surface is missing.

plan.approach_summary: Add a new Preact TimelinePanel to the spec-viewer webview that renders the existing transitions[] array from .spec-context.json as a vertical, oldest-first list grouped by step.
risks: TransitionBy type widen could collide with downstream consumers — mitigated by grepping for narrow switches before merging.
contentUpdated message becomes the carrier for both markdown and context-only changes — split into transitionsUpdated later if it gets noisy.

implement.key_finding: Live updates use viewerStateUpdated (not contentUpdated) to avoid clobbering markdown when the .spec-context.json watcher fires; index.tsx wires transitions on both message types.

T001.did: Widened TransitionBy to include 'sdd' and 'ai' literals already present on disk.

T002.did: Added transitions field to canonical ViewerState (auto-flows into ExtensionToViewerMessage.contentUpdated payload).

T003.did: Mirrored Transition type and added transitions field to webview ViewerState mirror.

T004.did: Created formatRelativeTime helper with just-now / Xm / Xh / Xd buckets and unknown fallback.

T005.did: Wrote _timeline.css with vertical-rail layout, step-grouped headings, actor badge variants, and theme-token colors.

T006.did: Populated viewerState.transitions from ctx.transitions in deriveViewerState.

T007.did: Added Jest cases for populated, missing, and empty transitions array.

T008.did: Added bucket-boundary tests for formatRelativeTime with pinned now argument.

T009.did: Built TimelineEntry component rendering substep, actor badge, and relative time with absolute ISO in title.

T010.did: Added timelineVisible and transitions signals to signals.ts.

T012.did: Added refreshContextIfDisplaying to SpecViewerProvider — posts viewerStateUpdated (not contentUpdated) to avoid clobbering markdown.
concerns: Used viewerStateUpdated message instead of contentUpdated as plan suggested — keeps markdown intact and is reactive enough; T014 wires transitions on both message types so behavior is identical.

T013.did: Built TimelinePanel — empty state when no transitions, otherwise grouped by consecutive same-step entries.

T014.did: Wired transitions signal in both contentUpdated and viewerStateUpdated handlers in index.tsx.

T015.did: Added Timeline toggle button to the right end of nav-primary with aria-pressed.

T016.did: Wired specViewer.refreshContextIfDisplaying into handleSpecContextChange; reordered extension.ts so specViewer is created before setupFileWatchers.
concerns: Required threading specViewer through setupFileWatchers + setupClaudeDirectoryWatcher signature and reordering specViewer creation in extension.ts. Plan didn't call out the extension.ts wiring change but it was unavoidable.

T017.did: Rendered TimelinePanel in App with lazy first-mount and hidden-attribute toggling so the markdown pane stays mounted.

T018.did: Added Timeline subsection under 'Reading Specs' in README.

T019.did: Added Timeline Panel section to docs/viewer-states.md describing toggle behavior, grouping, live updates, and override scope.

decisions: Use viewerStateUpdated (not contentUpdated) for context-only refreshes to avoid re-rendering markdown on every transition append.
Lazy-mount TimelinePanel on first toggle reveal so initial spec render is never blocked (NFR003).
Keep markdown pane mounted but hidden via the hidden attribute when timeline is on, so toggling back is instant.

concerns.note: Diverged from plan's contentUpdated wording; viewerStateUpdated is functionally equivalent and avoids clobbering markdown.
Plan didn't mention threading specViewer through setupFileWatchers, but it was unavoidable to wire the watcher → viewer refresh.

last_action: PR #152 opened — feat(spec-viewer): per-spec timeline panel
